title: G2PLUS Ivory Satin Ribbons 10mm: Thick Fabric Gift Wrap Ribbons for Crafting, Party Decoration, 22m
features: 【 Material】The gift ribbon roll is made of polyester fabric, strong and smooth, Lasts and doesn’t crease easily.
【Size】You'll get 1 rolls of 10mm wide ribbons and 22m in length. please allow slight errors on size. due to manual measurement.

【Looks Good on Wrapping up Presents】You can incorporate the simplicity brown paper with really beautiful ribbon. it will give a simple yet elegant look. it will add some nice sparkle when you use this gift ribbon for wrapping presents.

【Nice Ribbon for Handmade Project】These Satin ribbons are good to use in homemade card making or scrapbooking or for hanging up home ornaments. Ideal for wrapping up gifts or using for wedding decorations, wrapping around the bouquet or cake.

【Versatile Christmas Ribbons】This set of ribbons is perfect for for many type of craft and decoration such as making different decorations for your Christmas tree and a bow for a wreath! also good for present wrapping, gift packaging, party favor, hair bow, floral projects and so on.
description: Product Description Durable Ivory Satin Ribbons Soft ivory satin sheen adds a refined, timeless look to your projects. High-quality polyester with a smooth woven surface creates neat, elegant bows and accents while offering strength, colourfastness and a luxurious feel. Satin Ribbons in Four Sizes Available in four practical widths – 1cm, 2cm, 4cm and 5cm – each 22m roll offers ample length for everyday crafting, decorating and packaging needs, helping you match different designs and layers with a consistent, harmonious ivory tone. Ribbons for Gift Wrapping, Crafts, Hair Accessories and DIY Projects Perfect for gift wrapping, bouquets, invitations, sewing projects, hair accessories, floral arrangements and DIY décor. This versatile ribbon brings a delicate ivory touch to boxes, jars, table settings, chair décor, wreaths and handmade crafts. Satin Ribbons for Weddings, Engagements, Baby Showers, Birthdays, Anniversaries Ideal for weddings, engagements, bridal showers, baby showers, birthdays, anniversaries, Christmas, New Year, Easter, Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, graduations, corporate events, photo shoots and other elegant celebrations throughout the year.
